about.title: About
about.description:
Web application developer, technical product manager, and business analyst with over 8 years of experience in developing and analyzing digital platforms.
Worked on designing technical solutions linked to business objectives and supporting digital transformation.
Led multidisciplinary technical teams, and participated in implementing projects within specific timeframes and with high-quality deliverables.
Expert in documenting and analyzing requirements, and building roadmaps for digital products.
Also contributed to the development of technical content through specialized lectures and training workshops.

description.p1: An innovative solution that allows you to organize and share auctions easily online, giving you the opportunity to reach a wider audience without the need for physical presence.
description.p2: The platform provides integrated tools for setting up auctions, managing bids, interacting with users in real time, and handling payments securely through connected gateways.

features.f1: Integrated auction system using custom APIs.
features.f2: Supports a global audience with scalable infrastructure.
features.f4: Real-time reports and analytics on sales and activity.
features.f5: Live chat between sellers and buyers.

description.p1: Offers an advanced shopping experience powered by AI, making it easy to link shipments and track them accurately, along with automatic invoice issuance and tracking.
description.p2: The platform combines personalized product recommendations, seamless shipping integration, and real-time data analysis to improve the user experience and operational efficiency.

features.f1: Supports machine learning for personalized recommendations.
features.f2: Integrates with shipping systems for accurate delivery tracking.
features.f3: Auto-generates and tracks invoices in real time.
features.f4: Uses AI to improve sales performance and decision-making.
features.f5: Handles high-volume transactions via cloud architecture.
features.f6: Ensures data security with advanced encryption.
features.f7: Optimized for all devices with responsive design.

description.p1: Specifically designed for charitable organizations, it aims to simplify request management and service delivery efficiently.
description.p2: The platform provides advanced tools for tracking beneficiary requests, organizing them, and communicating seamlessly.

features.f1: Automatically processes and categorizes requests by priority.
features.f2: Tracks request status from submission to completion.
features.f3: Provides detailed performance and service reports.
features.f4: Integrates with email and SMS for communication.
features.f5: Distributes resources with accurate data tracking.
features.f7: Dashboard for managing cases and service indicators.

description.p1: Provides a unique opportunity for institutions and trainers to join and easily offer their courses.
description.p2: The platform allows linking courses to comprehensive trainer profiles, enabling trainees to know details about the trainer's experience.

features.f1: Cloud-based system supporting scalable digital infrastructure.
features.f2: Custom course creation with advanced editing tools.
features.f3: Detailed trainer profiles showcasing credentials and expertise.
features.f4: Analytics reports on performance and success rates.
features.f5: Interactive learning with quizzes and simulations.
features.f6: Integration with live webinars and video sessions.
features.f7: Supports multilingual content for broader accessibility.

description.p1: A comprehensive platform to manage innovation competitions and hackathons from start to finish.
description.p2: The system enables participant registration, team formation, judging, scoring, and result announcements with ease.

features.f1: Online registration and team matching system.
features.f2: Judge panel dashboard with scoring tools.
features.f3: Project submission management with evaluation criteria.
features.f4: Live leaderboard to display scores in real time.

description.p1: A robust solution for managing technical and customer support requests across departments.
description.p2: The platform streamlines the ticket lifecycle with automation, escalation paths, and reporting tools.

features.f2: Categorization and prioritization of support requests.
features.f3: Internal notes and assignment to support agents.
features.f4: Response time tracking and SLA monitoring.
features.f7: Knowledge base integration for quick solutions.

description.p1: An offline-ready system designed for managing incoming and outgoing correspondence with high data privacy.
description.p2: The platform offers full control over documents, tracking, reporting, and instant backup—suitable for internal and secure government environments.

features.f3: Unified tracking of all correspondence across departments.
features.f4: Instant reporting and filtering by status, date, or entity.
features.f5: Smart search engine across all archived content.
features.f6: Instant local backups for data recovery.
features.f7: Expandable to include attachments and workflow routing.

description.p1: This workshop introduces how to build and design modern web interfaces using the popular Vue.js framework.
description.p2: You’ll explore its key features and build your first Vue-based application step by step.

index.i5: Using props, data, and computed properties

resume.title: Build a Resume Website Connected to a Database

description.p1: This workshop walks you through building a personal website that displays your resume using modern HTML/CSS and JavaScript.
description.p2: You’ll learn how to connect the site to a real-time database using Google Sheets, and how to update and manage your content efficiently.

index.i1: Designing the resume layout and UI
index.i2: Using Google Sheets as a live database
index.i3: Fetching and displaying data with JavaScript
index.i4: Creating an admin form for content updates
index.i5: Deploying the website to the public

description.p1: This workshop explores how to use animations to enhance user experience in modern web interfaces.
description.p2: Participants will learn how to implement scroll-based animations, transitions, and interactive effects using CSS and JavaScript libraries.

index.i1: The importance of motion in UX
index.i3: Using animation libraries like AOS and GSAP

prototypes.title: Prototyping for Web and App Design

description.p1: This workshop introduces tools and techniques for building effective UI/UX prototypes.
description.p2: Attendees will learn how to turn wireframes into interactive prototypes using Figma and other modern tools.

index.i1: Understanding the role of prototypes in the design process
index.i3: Creating user flows and click-through models

description.p1: This workshop focuses on the essential tools and platforms that help individuals and businesses establish a strong digital presence.
description.p2: You’ll learn how to build a basic brand online, manage content, and create landing pages without writing code.

index.i1: What is digital presence and why it matters
index.i3: Building a landing page using Carrd and Notion
index.i5: Free tools for personal branding and visibility

description.p1: This workshop introduces strategies and tools to help teams and professionals reduce dependency on external services and build internal digital capabilities.
description.p2: It focuses on collaborative platforms, automation, and knowledge sharing practices that enhance operational efficiency.

index.i2: Examples of internal tools vs external dependencies
index.i3: Using Notion, Google Workspace, and other collaboration platforms
index.i5: Building documentation and internal knowledge bases
